description.value:
Category: Clan

Prerequisite: Hoshigaki Clan, Wielder of a Legend, Level 12+

You've put enough of yourself into your Apex Weapon that it has become part of you, resonating with your chakra and becoming one with your body. 
You gain the following benefits:

 

• Increase your Strength or Constitution score by 1, to a maximum of 20. 


• You always know where your Apex Weapon is located as long as it is within 10 miles of you. 
You can sense everything within 10 feet of your weapon as if you were there yourself. 


• You can spend a use of Ravenous Chakra to consume chakra through your weapon. 
For the next minute, once per turn, when you would deal weapon damage with your Apex Weapon, it deals chakra damage to the target equal to the weapons damage die. 
You gain the same amount as temporary chakra points. 


• When you would use your Ravenous Chakra clan feature on a creature whose level is greater than or equal to your own, they are an Elite or Solo adversary or if they have a higher Constitution ability score, when you would deal chakra damage to them, you increase the damage dealt by 1 damage die. 
If the target has multiple resources that can be spent like chakra (Such as White Chakra, Calories, or even Reserve Cells), you also reduce that resource by 2 for each instance of chakra damage you deal.

activation.condition: when you would deal weapon damage with your Apex Weapon
